name: Tome I: Dungeon Crawl
description:
You wake to find yourself trapped in a dungeon with no memory of how you got there. Find your way out.

Art comes from nomu103 on danbooru.

I attempted to emulate a text adventure game. Since you are the player, you're following the bot's story. To maximize the experience, follow it's suggested actions. Note that it may mess up from time to time.

Notes:

This was a headache to make. The systems might be a little overcomplicated for the tools available as fixing one issue always seems to lead to another.

This is the best version of my dungeon crawl bot, but I would not consider it to be anywhere near perfect and I lost the drive to work on it when all the proxy services seemed to throw a fit. I might pick it back up later or move onto something new.

I didn't really want to post it, but maybe someone will like it, and that's a good enough reason.

Feedback is appreciated.
creator: faerietales
